label: Fixed
items: Dashboard task tiles and category chips now take you to the right view (the Completed/automatic tiles open today's calendar agenda; category chips filter your routines)
"Jump to a day" links (dashboard, weekly overview, daily brief) now open that exact day on the calendar
The "customise quick launcher" shortcut now scrolls straight to it in Account settings
Help → Account topics (display name, subscription, AI usage) now open your Account settings instead of the Garden Quiz
